qa_pairs.question: What is the recommended configuration for achieving optimal performance when running multi-node NAMD GPU jobs on the Narval cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: For optimal performance when running multi-node NAMD GPU jobs on Narval, it is recommended to fully utilize the nodes. This involves running 8 tasks in total across 2 nodes, with each task using 12 threads and 1 GPU. This setup fully utilizes Narval GPU nodes, which have 48 cores and 4 GPUs per node.

qa_pairs.question: Why might NAMD report fewer cores being used than actually allocated when running multi-node GPU jobs on Narval, for example, 88 instead of 96 cores?
qa_pairs.answer: NAMD might report fewer cores than actually allocated because one core per task is reserved for a communications thread. For instance, across two fully utilized Narval GPU nodes, with a total of 96 cores (2 nodes * 48 cores/node), NAMD might report only 88 cores in use, which is considered normal behaviour.
